name: MICROCHIP TECHNOLOGY INC
summary: Microchip Technology Incorporated designs, develops, manufactures, and sells semiconductor products including microcontrollers, mixed-signal, analog, and Flash-IP integrated circuits. The company serves original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) across various industries. It offers products such as EEPROM, EERAM, SRAM, FPGA, RF, and SiC-based solutions, supported by embedded solutions engineers (ESEs) and client engagement managers (CEMs).
